title.default: Can I Eat Spicy Soup While Pregnant?
title.ng: Can I Eat Pepper Soup While Pregnant?
title.us: Can I Eat Spicy Chicken Soup While Pregnant?
title.uk: Can I Eat Hot & Sour Soup While Pregnant?

intro.default: Craving spicy soup at 2am is a pregnancy sport.
intro.ng: Let’s be honest. Craving pepper soup at 2am is basically a pregnancy sport.

content.default: Spicy soup is generally safe if well cooked and made with clean ingredients.
content.ng: Pepper soup is generally safe if it’s well cooked with clean ingredients. Use goat meat or chicken. The ginger can help with nausea.
content.us: Chicken noodle soup is generally safe if it’s well cooked. Avoid raw ingredients.

us: Skip canned soup with high sodium

faqs.a: No, spice does not hurt baby. It only affects your stomach.
